div1.entryFree: Misprise or Misprize, to undervalue, to slight, to despise (Fr. mépriser): --ing what they look on, Ado III, 1, 52. I am altogether --d, As I, 1, 177. your reputation shall not be --d, I, 2, 192. by the --ing of a maid too virtuous for the contempt of empire, All's III, 2, 33. --ing the knight opposed, Troil. IV, 5, 74 (Ff disprising).
